title: Ubik — Page 109
raw_text:
Joe said, “I’ll go with you.” 
     “Maybe we should never tell them about her.” 
     “I think we should,” Joe said. “Since it’s going to happen 
again. It may happen before we get back. It may be 
happening now.” 
     “Then we better get our trip to Baltimore over as quickly 
as possible,” Al said. He started out of the office. Joe Chip 
followed.
